ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the location belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the location is in */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sex category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of the age group */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  "average_life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy for the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cause */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cause (e.g., diseases, injuries) */,
  "sub_causes" TEXT /* List of sub-causes or related conditions */,
  "severity_index" INTEGER /* Index indicating the severity of the cause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, hospital, research) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the data was collected from */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex the data is for */,
  "age_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group the data is for */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause the data is for */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data was collected */,
  "ylls_percent" REAL /* Percentage of years of lost life (YLLs) due to the cause */,
  "deaths_count" INTEGER /* Number of deaths recorded in the dataset */,
  "disabilities_count" INTEGER /* Number of disabilities recorded in the dataset */,
  "ylls_count" INTEGER /* Total years of lost life (YLLs) recorded in the dataset */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the dataset */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation (e.g., pending, validated, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_age_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_id") REFERENCES ages ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who validated the version */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the content of the file */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, MD) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the content of the file */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session during which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "publications" TEXT /* List of publications by the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data analyst */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a data analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the data analyst */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the data analyst is affiliated with */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations of the data analyst */,
  "projects_involved" TEXT /* List of projects the analyst has worked on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the administrator is affiliated with */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions granted to the administrator */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the administrator's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
